_comment: David Hattenborg's LOCKED voice. Recipe-based for portability (build plan Section 6). Approved by Fabio on 2026-06-20 after auditioning in JJ's Higgsfield. Arthur is a shared PRESET voice (ElevenLabs engine via Higgsfield generate_audio) — not an account-bound custom clone — so it reproduces on Fabio's Higgsfield account from the voice_id below.
portable_fallback: ElevenLabs (Arthur is an ElevenLabs voice; match it directly if ever moving off Higgsfield)
register: British English, theatrical, dramatic, wise, warm, curious, optimistic — a storyteller, never a lecturer
delivery_prompt: Write the narration itself for delivery: strict British English; theatrical pacing via full stops and em-dashes; short, weighted sentences at the climax. ElevenLabs preset voices take their tone from the written text, not a separate style prompt.

settings._note: Generated with engine defaults, which Fabio approved. ElevenLabs engine_settings (stability, similarity_boost, style) can be tuned later if needed.

portability_check.question: Are Higgsfield custom voices account-bound?
portability_check.finding: Not applicable — Arthur is a built-in PRESET (shared catalogue), not a custom clone, so it is reproducible on any Higgsfield account via voice_id. Custom-clone portability remains untested and is avoided by using a preset.
portability_check.note: ElevenLabs is the deeper fallback: Arthur is an ElevenLabs voice, so it can be matched directly there if the pipeline ever moves off Higgsfield.
